name: how-to-setup-local-ollama-with-claude-code
description: 🚀 Complete guide to setting up Claude Code with free local Ollama on macOS - no API keys, no billing
author: Rob Brennan <rob@sploosh.ai>

scripts.check:gemma4: ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4-26b' || npm run model:create:gemma4
scripts.check:gemma4-e4b: ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4-e4b' || npm run model:create:gemma4-e4b
scripts.check:gpt-oss: ollama list | grep -q 'gpt-oss:20b' || ollama pull gpt-oss:20b
scripts.check:qwen: ollama list | grep -q 'qwen2.5-coder:7b' || ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b
scripts.model:build:gemma4: npm run model:create:gemma4 && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-26b
scripts.model:build:gemma4-e4b: npm run model:create:gemma4-e4b && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-e4b
scripts.model:create:gemma4: (ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4:26b-a4b-it-q8_0' || ollama pull gemma4:26b-a4b-it-q8_0) && ollama create gemma4-26b -f modelfiles/gemma4-26b.Modelfile
scripts.model:create:gemma4-e4b: (ollama list | grep -q 'gemma4:e4b-it-q8_0' || ollama pull gemma4:e4b-it-q8_0) && ollama create gemma4-e4b -f modelfiles/gemma4-e4b.Modelfile
scripts.ollama:restart: launchctl setenv OLLAMA_FLASH_ATTENTION 1 && launchctl setenv OLLAMA_KV_CACHE_TYPE q8_0 && killall Ollama; sleep 1 && open -a Ollama && echo 'Ollama restarted with flash_attention and kv_cache_type=q8_0'
scripts.start:gemma4: npm run check:gemma4 && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-26b
scripts.start:gemma4-e4b: npm run check:gemma4-e4b && ollama launch claude --model gemma4-e4b
scripts.start:gpt-oss: npm run check:gpt-oss && ollama launch claude --model gpt-oss:20b
scripts.start:qwen: npm run check:qwen && ollama launch claude --model qwen2.5-coder:7b
